slogan: Complete your mobile experience with our handpicked accessories range.

cards.name: Mobile Cases
cards.desc: Protective covers for all major phone models. Plain, designer & rugged options.
cards.waText: Hello, I need a mobile case

cards.name: Chargers
cards.desc: Fast chargers, travel adapters & wireless charging pads from trusted brands.

cards.name: Earbuds & Earphones
cards.desc: TWS earbuds, wired earphones & over-ear headphones from boAt, Zebronics & more.

cards.name: Smart Watches
cards.desc: Fitness bands & smartwatches with health tracking, call & notification support.

cards.name: Power Banks
cards.desc: 10000mAh to 20000mAh options with fast charging support. Portable & durable.
cards.waText: Hello, I need a power bank

cards.name: Cables & More
cards.desc: USB-C, Lightning, Micro-USB cables. Screen protectors, OTG adapters & more.
